description:
This dataset contains 25,000 synthetic healthcare records designed for machine learning models that classify diseases based on patient symptoms. It includes demographic attributes, symptom lists, and confirmed diagnoses across 30 common acute, chronic, infectious, and neurological diseases.

The dataset is well-suited for:

Multi-class disease classification
Symptom pattern analysis
Medical decision support modeling
NLP feature extraction on symptom text
Data mining and biomedical research

Each record corresponds to a unique patient with a generated combination of symptoms and diagnosis created from realistic patterns while maintaining anonymity.

This dataset is purely synthetic, meaning no real patient data is used.

📌 Column Descriptions

Patient_ID — A randomized unique identifier assigned to each synthetic patient.
Age — Age of the patient (ranging from 1 to 90 years).
Gender — Gender of the patient (Male, Female, or Other).
Symptoms — A comma-separated list containing 3 to 7 symptoms.
Symptom_Count — Total number of symptoms listed for the patient.
Disease — The diagnosed condition; one of the 30 diseases included in the dataset.

🦠 List of Diseases Included

Common Cold, Influenza, COVID-19, Pneumonia, Tuberculosis, Diabetes, Hypertension, Asthma, Heart Disease, Chronic Kidney Disease, Gastritis, Food Poisoning, Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS), Liver Disease, Ulcer, Migraine, Epilepsy, Stroke, Dementia, Parkinson’s Disease, Allergy, Arthritis, Anemia, Thyroid Disorder, Obesity, Depression, Anxiety, Dermatitis, Sinusitis, Bronchitis.

🎯 Possible Use Cases

Multi-class disease prediction
Symptom pattern analysis
Clinical decision support prototypes
NLP-based text classification
Educational and academic projects

🔐 License

This dataset is released under CC0 Public Domain, meaning it is free to use, modify, and share without restrictions.

recordsets.recordset_description:
File Name:
Healthcare.csv

File Format:
Comma-Separated Values (CSV)

File Size:
Varies depending on Kaggle processing (approx. a few MB)

Number of Rows:
25,000 records

Number of Columns:
6 columns

Column Details:

Patient_ID – Unique randomized identifier assigned to each synthetic patient.
Age – Patient’s age ranging from 1 to 90 years.
Gender – Gender of the patient (Male, Female, or Other).
Symptoms – A comma-separated list of 3 to 7 symptoms describing the patient’s condition.
Symptom_Count – Number of symptoms listed for the patient.
Disease – The diagnosed medical condition, selected from 30 possible diseases.

File Overview:

This file contains synthetic healthcare data designed for multi-class disease prediction tasks. Each row represents a patient with a set of symptoms and a confirmed diagnosis. No real patient information is used in this dataset. All values are artificially generated to resemble realistic medical patterns.

results.reason: Not sensitive; it's a unique identifier and explicitly out of scope.
Directly represents 'Age', which is an IN-SCOPE sensitive characteristic.
Directly represents 'Gender', which is an IN-SCOPE sensitive characteristic.
Not an IN-SCOPE sensitive characteristic; describes medical conditions, not a protected attribute like disability or genetic features.
Not an IN-SCOPE sensitive characteristic; it's a numerical count related to health, not a protected attribute.
Represents diagnosed medical conditions, many of which are significant health conditions or impairments, aligning with 'Disability & health conditions'.
